revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image. Pixel-art game asset sheet.

Profile: snes16_platformer_v1. Preset: field_prop_32. Asset kind/type: field-prop prop.
Canvas: EXACTLY 32x32 pixels, one frame only, 1 row x 1 column. No grid lines, no borders, no labels, no text, no watermark.
Background: fill every empty pixel with solid #FF00FF chroma key magenta, no gradients, no alpha, no texture.

Subject: a tiny top-down Japanese fantasy RPG wooden bridge module compressed to fit inside a 32x32 field prop tile. The bridge spans horizontally left-to-right across an implied vertical river, but DO NOT draw water. The deck is the walkable surface. Draw aged wooden planks running left-to-right with readable plank gaps, warm brown and amber tones, plank color close to #8b5e3c. Add simple square-cut wooden railings on the north/far/top side only, with subtle warm shadow under railing cross-beams. Show three or four round wooden support posts visible on the south/front/bottom face, post color close to #6b4020. At the west/left and east/right ends include small stone ledges/abutment edges where planks meet stone, stone edge close to #9a8f7a. Leave an open underside gap suggesting water can pass beneath, but no river water. Bottom-edge grounded, no isometric perspective, no vanishing point.

Pixel-art constraints: crisp low-resolution SNES/16-bit style pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent palette, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source, bright cheerful Ghibli Japanese satoyama golden-hour feeling. Clear collision footprint. Keep entire bridge inside the single 32x32 cell with solid magenta margin on all sides. No detached fragments: no isolated pixel islands, no dust specks, no seam slivers, no residue.

Avoid: no characters, no creatures, no birds, no companion creature, no logos, no likeness of Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna, no samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects, no horror mood, no gloomy palette, no UI, no text, no letter emblems.
